title: Array mutation — update a value in place
objectives: Identify the collection, selected index, old value, and new value
Distinguish mutation from creating a separate result
Use object identity to explain aliases to the same list

blocks.text: What changes when code writes a new value into an existing list position?

blocks.content: Goal: trace the selected cell from its previous value to its current value.

blocks.prompt: The list is [1, 2, 3] and the code writes 9 at index 0. What list is returned?

steps: Read the existing collection and selected index.
Write the verified new value into the same collection.
Show the old-to-new transition in State.

rows.label: Collection identity
rows.neighbor: A separate result list is built

questions.prompt: If the assignment becomes values[1] = 7 for [1, 2, 3], what is returned?

fields.value: Indexed write into an existing collection
Role, name, previous value, current value, and object identity
The selected cell changes in place
Change the index, literal, names, and inputs, then predict the returned list
